title: Use WorkForms as a Quiz
excerpt: Has anyone successfully used WorkForms to give quizzes or tests? We have an employee evaluation that needs to be passed before they can move onto the next phase of testing. Is there a way to mark answers as correct or in…

posts.author: ajasz (Angelica Jaszewski)
posts.cookedHtml:
Has anyone successfully used WorkForms to give quizzes or tests? We have an employee evaluation that needs to be passed before they can move onto the next phase of testing. Is there a way to mark answers as correct or incorrect?

Thanks!

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Angelica,

Once the form has been submitted and exists as an item (and associated columns) in your board, could you perhaps set up a status column or even checkbox column for each answered column to mark the answers as correct or incorrect?

posts.author: Khawla_Issaoui (Creativas)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @ajasz ,

This is Khawla from the Creativas Team!

We’ve just launched a new app on the marketplace: Smart Courses LMS - monday.com Marketplace a Learning Management System (LMS).

Our app allows you to add questions ( 7 types of questions: Single choice, Multiple choices, Ordering, Freetext, Fill in the blank, Matching, Essay), create exams and mark essay questions as correct or incorrect via a validation module.
You can share these courses with users, track their answers and check other insights

image (3)1920×1080 142 KB

You can use Smart Courses for:

  • Employee onboarding and HR operations

  • Assign courses with due dates for continuous learning and knowledge assessment

  • Notify users about the assignments

  • Boost employees’ skills and expertise to drive better performance

  • Gather insights and export reports to track participants’ learning progress

  • Exam and assessment

You can book a live Demo to get an overview of the app
Find more details in our documentation

Cheers,
Khawla
